<?php namespace Illuminate\View\Compilers; interface CompilerInterface { /** * Get the path to the compiled version of a view. * * @param string $path * @return string */ public function getCompiledPath($path); /** * Determine if the given view is expired. * * @param string $path * @return bool */ public function isExpired($path); /** * Compile the view at the given path. * * @param string $path * @return void */ public function compile($path); }
